Name: Type 50 Yinglung
Desc:
3-piece set effect: Wearer's ATK <@ba.vup>+15.0%</>. 
When any operator in the team casts a battle skill, the wearer gains 1 stack of <@ba.key>Yinglung's Edge</> that gives DMG <@ba.vup>+20.0%</> to the wearer's next combo skill. <@ba.key>Yinglung's Edge</> can stack 3 time(s).
